desc: DONE offline: audited Asahi U-Boot 8aa706b2, confirmed the normal Apple target panics on t6040 and selects unsafe/unready bus probes, and prepared patches/uboot-t6040-noio-prep.patch. The draft APPLE_NOIO target maps only m1n1-fixed RAM/framebuffer, guards NVMe helpers, disables autoboot and PCI/NVMe/USB/input/DART/PMGR/WDT/serial, and embeds EFI hello. Two clean arm64-container builds reproduced exact config/binary hashes. Host-built a reproducible Linux+J614s DT+initramfs FIT and derived the required raw U-Boot Image-size zero padding. No artifact was saved as a live candidate; no rig/enrollment/APFS/Boot Policy work or external post. Result: done/2026-07-23-t6040-uboot-noio-prep.md.
author: claude
